headline: What to Do When Chemicals at Work Make It Hard to Breathe
articleBody: It’s scary when you can’t catch your breath after a shift. Document every chemical or dust cloud you encounter, as these details are gold for your claim. See a doctor right away to link your symptoms to the site. If the insurance company starts dragging their feet or blaming your past habits, give us a call at 801-746-0290 to protect your rights.
